title: AI/ML Engineer  (0-1 yrs of experience)
company_focus:
End-to-end software solutions for customizable products and
spaces design in Kitchen & Bath, Furniture, Window, Glass &
Door, and Flooring industries
description:
Job Title: AI/ML Engineer (0-1 yrs of experience) Location:
Kochi, India (Hybrid) Full time

About Us

Cyncly is a global technology powerhouse with 2,400+
employees and 70,000+ customers across 100+ countries.
Cyncly transforms the way customizable products and spaces
are imagined, designed, sold, managed and made. Our end-to-
end software solutions connect professional designers,
retailers and manufacturers to the world's largest
repository of product content. Today, our business spans
across the Kitchen & Bath, Furniture, Window, Glass & Door,
and Flooring industries with operations in North & South
America, Europe, Asia Pacific and Africa.

Cyncly brings over 30 years of experience to deliver more
value for our customers through an expanded portfolio of
end-to-end solutions. Our global presence allows us to
provide world-class support and sales with a local touch,
providing the best possible customer experience.

Cyncly is now embarking on an exciting journey as we
continue to expand through strong organic growth and
complementary acquisitions, backed by leading growth private
equity firms specializing in technology.

Cyncly & the power of AI

At Cyncly, we believe in unlocking the power of AI to
deliver highly personalized and extraordinary experiences
for our customers and their clients.

We are on a dynamic journey of seeking exceptional talent to
add critical AI models and functionality to our products
used by over 17,000 customers worldwide. This is an exciting
opportunity to be a part of a collaborative team that
fosters continuous learning and growth, where you'll work on
exciting data-driven projects that redefine the Spaces for
Living industry. AI is reshaping private and business life
at an unprecedented speed, and Cyncly is committed to
leading the charge in delivering new sources of value for
our customers.

About the Role

As a AI/ML Engineer within the AI Center of Innovation at
Cyncly, you will be instrumental in designing and
implementing state-of-the-art solutions utilizing AI and
computer vision models.

Your role extends to crafting and deploying APIs that
integrate AI model-based solutions seamlessly with client
applications. You will be part of a team which is constantly
involved in researching and implementing cutting edge AI
based solutions which not only improves experience of our
customers but also support internal users in their day-to-
day tasks. Being the central AI Engineering team supporting
the entire organization, it is imperative for this team to
be at the forefront of innovation and individuals with R&D
mindset are ideal for this role.

Join us and make a significant impact to the product
landscape of Cyncly through your skills and in the process
build rich skillset for yourself. Apply now to be a pivotal
part of Cyncly's ongoing growth and success story.

Key Responsibilities :

- Design data solutions to meet business, technical and user
  requirements. This includes building REST APIs that meet
  the functional/non-functional business requirements and
  meets the standards.
- Designing of DB schema for Vector Database and writing
  efficient and scalable queries.
- Meet the highest quality standards in code. And evangelise
  code quality among the team.
- Create quick POCs to demonstrate and show case the
  technology capabilities in solving the business need.
- Building robust build and deployment pipelines using Azure
  DevOps tools. Working with DevOps engineers to make sure
  continuous integration and continuous deployment.
- Understanding the cyber security threats and provide
  solutions to mitigate the security risks.
- Trouble shooting and debugging skills to quickly identify
  the root causes and address the issues with both tactical
  and permanent solution.
- Work with Data scientists and Data Engineers in
  understanding the end to end design of the enterprise
  systems. Contribute in technical discussion in providing
  best software solution.
- Make the application scale to the demand. Help DevOps
  engineers in configuring and deploying in a secured and
  highly scalable cloud environment.
- Improve the Coding standards and DevOps maturity by
  constantly adopting the best standards.
- Maintain unit testing, integrated testing and automated test
  environments for quicker delivery.
- Deliver on time with high quality.
- Maintain technical documentation of the solution, which
  presents the design to various stake holders.
- Provide guidance and mentoring to Interns/Freshers and other
  AI/ML engineers.

Required experience and qualifications:

- Bachelor’s/master’s degree in computer science, MCA, AI or
  related fields.
- 0-1 year of experience in AI/ML space.
- Good knowledge of python.
- Some exposure to python libraries like Tensorflow, PyTorch,
  OpenCV, Pillow, scikit-image Familiarity with concepts of
  Deep Learning, Gen AI and Computer Vision
- Good knowledge of SQL.
- Good academic record.
- Analytical, problem-solving, and decision-making skills.
- Demonstrate excellent analytical and technical skills and be
  a good team player.
- Role involves working with multifunctional teams and so
  excellent communication skills are a must.

Working for us

At Cyncly, we call our team OneCyncly, a reflection of how
we work together as one, united by our purpose: powering
businesses that bring spaces to life. Our strength comes
from our diversity of experiences, perspectives, and skills
- and we thrive when we work together with openness, trust,
and respect. Here, you’ll join a group of colleagues who
take ownership, solve problems, and focus on making an
impact. We embrace curiosity, welcome new ideas, and see
mistakes as opportunities to learn. You’ll have the freedom
to work flexibly and autonomously, supported by teammates
and leaders who are committed to your growth. We celebrate
the different ways people contribute and encourage everyone
- from every background - to bring their authentic self to
work. Because when we collaborate, challenge each other, and
share what we know, we build something better together. If
you want to work in a place where your ideas matter, your
growth is valued, and your work shapes the spaces people
live, work, and play in - come join us.
responsibilities: Design and implement AI and computer vision model-based solutions to meet business requirements
Build REST APIs that integrate AI model-based solutions with client applications
Design DB schema for Vector Database and write efficient, scalable queries
Create quick POCs to demonstrate technology capabilities in solving business needs
Build robust deployment pipelines using Azure DevOps tools with CI/CD
Collaborate with Data Scientists and Data Engineers on enterprise system design
Troubleshoot and debug issues with tactical and permanent solutions
Maintain unit testing, integration testing, and automated test environments
use_cases: AI-powered design solutions for customizable products and spaces
Computer vision applications for Kitchen & Bath, Furniture, Window, Glass & Door, and Flooring industries
Personalized customer experiences through AI functionality
Internal user productivity support through AI-based tools
Enterprise search and content discovery for product content repository
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves designing and implementing AI and computer
vision models, crafting APIs that integrate AI model-based
solutions, and working on cutting-edge AI-based solutions as
part of an AI Center of Innovation. This is hands-on work
building and deploying AI/ML systems, not support
infrastructure.
